creator: john.c.prather@gmail.com
text:
I believe the previously attached patch is likely to fail, as I don't
believe it was against the current revision which is marked as BROKEN.

At any rate, enough time has passed since my last update to this PR
that we're getting itchy for 3.9.1.   Can we please ignore the
previous patches in this PR and attempt to commit this attached one?

Fixes:

a) rc script
b) pkg-plist (the reason port is marked BROKEN)
c) upgrade to 3.9.1

Thanks!

-john
